scope: Cycle 24: Bug hunt C23 (biome_radial.gd) + wire BiomeRadial + OghamEquipPanel

bugs_found.description: _calculate_player_maturity() called 16x per frame (2 per icon × 8 icons) via _is_biome_locked() in _draw_biome_icon() and _draw_biome_label(). Each call does get_node_or_null + dict reads + faction loop.
bugs_found.fix: Added _maturity_cache var. Cached once in _draw() before icon loop and once in _handle_click() before lock check. _is_biome_locked() now uses cache.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C23: 1 MEDIUM performance bug found and fixed (maturity cache). Features: BiomeRadial wired into PARTIR flow (was hardcoded bypass), OghamEquipPanel created for pre-run ogham selection. Bible s.2.2 compliance achieved. 30 total bugs fixed across 24 cycles.
